figures.caption: Table 1. Demographic and clinical summary by group. Values are mean ± SD unless noted. 280 Education and MMSE decline with group severity (p<0.001 by one-way ANOVA), while age 281 is modestly higher in MCI/AD. (Gender distribution was balanced across groups.) 282
Table 2. Speech feature statistics by group (mean ± SD). All group differences are 339 statistically significant (p<0.001) by ANOVA. AD patients speak more slowly and with more 340 hesitations. 341
